title: Disturbing video surfaces as Klaudia Zakrzewska hit by Gabrielle Carrington Mercedes after clash outside London nightclub
summary_full: Klaudia Zakrzewska, known as Klaudia Glam, is in critical condition after being hit by a car outside a London nightclub. Video shows a fight with Gabrielle Carrington before the crash. Carrington has been arrested, police confirmed. Two others were injured. Authorities are asking witnesses to come forward as the investigation continues.
